calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-01-2023 Off Calendar

Motion To Strike Defendants Answer To Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-03-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF GREENSTONE INC'S Motion To Strike Defendants Answer To Complaint.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion to strike answer to complaint is granted.

Plaintiff to submit a proposed form of order.

Judge: Ricahd B. Ulmer Jr, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2023 Continued To May-24-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Strike Defendants Answer To Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-02-2023 Continued To Apr-03-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF GREENSTONE INC Motion To Strike Defendants Answer To Complaint

Continued to April 3, 2023. By March 10, 2023, movant shall attempt to contact the defendant at (415) 541-9590 (client's phone number on order allowing withdrawal of counsel) and inform defendant that its answer will be stricken unless defendant obtains counsel by March 24, 2023. Movant to file a declaration by March 17, 2023, explaining the result of its phone call.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer: W. Trupek, Not reported (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-24-2023 Continued To Mar-29-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Nov-21-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel for DEFENDANT CCPC, INC:

Joshua Safron's unopposed motion to be relieved as counsel is granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
